content.body: What's the correct way to preserve links to definitions when you change their contents in the HTML spec? I seem to recall there being some legacy-id attribute or something but can't seem to find it.
Luke Warlow: just use an id attribute on the dfn
content.formatted_body: Luke Warlow: just use an id attribute on the dfn

content.body: But then the "new" name doesn't get linkified iirc? I guess that's probably okay? Context is HTMLOrSvgElement getting renamed
Luke Warlow: yes it will. It will just use the old ID for the links, which is fine. We have a lot of history captured in fragment identifiers.
content.formatted_body: Luke Warlow: yes it will. It will just use the old ID for the links, which is fine. We have a lot of history captured in fragment identifiers.
